title: Total Market Volume
query: SELECT (COALESCE(SUM(Count), 0) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Count), 0) FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate)) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(Count), 0) AS bought FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} unit(s) bought and sold through market transactions during the report period. Raw volume tells the story of a trading operation's true scale — a commander moving enormous tonnages of cargo is participating in the galaxy's economy at an entirely different level from someone who dabbles between combat sessions.
details.help: MarketBuy/Sell Count is units per transaction. total drives the title as the combined throughput (buy + sell).

tagLines: Total commodity market throughput compiled. Buy and sell volumes noted in the economic activity record.
Volume is how the galaxy measures commitment to trade. This period, you moved a lot of cargo.
The tonnage doesn't care about the commodity type. The scale is the story here.
